CreateProfile.description: Grants permission to create a profile

CreateTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to create a trust anchor

DeleteAttributeMapping.description: Grants permission to delete a mapping rule from a profile

DeleteCrl.description: Grants permission to delete a certificate revocation list (crl)

DeleteProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a profile

DeleteTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to delete a trust anchor

DisableCrl.description: Grants permission to disable a certificate revocation list (crl)

DisableProfile.description: Grants permission to disable a profile

DisableTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to disable a trust anchor

EnableCrl.description: Grants permission to enable a certificate revocation list (crl)

EnableProfile.description: Grants permission to enable a profile

EnableTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to enable a trust anchor

GetCrl.description: Grants permission to get a certificate revocation list (crl)

GetProfile.description: Grants permission to get a profile

GetSubject.description: Grants permission to get a subject

GetTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to get a trust anchor

ImportCrl.description: Grants permission to import a certificate revocation list (crl)

ListCrls.description: Grants permission to list certificate revocation lists (crls)

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

ListTrustAnchors.description: Grants permission to list trust anchors

PutAttributeMapping.description: Grants permission to put a mapping rule into a profile

PutNotificationSettings.description: Grants permission to attach notification settings to a trust anchor

ResetNotificationSettings.description: Grants permission to reset custom notification settings to IAM Roles Anywhere defined default state

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateCrl.description: Grants permission to update a certificate revocation list (crl)

UpdateProfile.description: Grants permission to update a profile

UpdateTrustAnchor.description: Grants permission to update a trust anchor

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
